summary: Cap limit=10 on /search, /playlists/{id}/tracks, and /artists/{id}/albums in transcendence discover commands; paginate via fetchAllPaged for T11.
reason: Spotify's post-2024-11-27 new-app deprecation silently caps `limit` at ~10 on these endpoints despite the spec declaring max=50 — requests with higher limits return HTTP 400 'Invalid limit'. T11 (`discover artist-gaps`) was the headline casualty; T10 (`discover via-playlists`) also affected. Pagination compensates so the user-visible behavior stays full-discography for artists with >10 albums.
validated_outcome: discover artist-gaps 4Z8W4fKeB5YxbusRsdQVPb returns Radiohead's full chronological discography against the local saved-albums set.
